name: Sugar Free Blueberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 10 drops - OR up to 10 drops Liquid butter flavoring.
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie plate with the crust.
2. Pick over, wash, and drain the berries.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the Sweet and Low, cinnamon, nutmeg, lemon juice, quick tapioca, and liquid butter flavoring.
4. Toss the berries with the mixture, being careful not to crush them too much.
5. Pour the berry filling into the crust, making sure all the "goodies" are scraped from the bowl.
6. Cover with the top crust and seal the edges.
7. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes, then reduce the heat to 325°F and bake for an additional 45 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
8. For added flavor, sprinkle a light mixture of Sweet and Low and cinnamon on top of the crust before baking.
9. Cool on a wire rack and serve with a dollop of Lite Cool Whip or a small scoop of vanilla ice cream if desired.
Exchanges: Pie only - 1/8 pie equals 1 fruit, 1 1/2 starch, 1 1/2 fat
Note: I usually put a large piece of foil or a cookie sheet under the pie to prevent any juices from escaping into the oven.
